title: Pack Of 3 Reusable Straw Cleaning Brush Mini Bottle Brushes Pipe Cleaner Brush
features: This pack of three straw cleaner brushes are a great addition to any kitchenware range, made from stainless steel with a small brush on one end and a hook for easy hanging and drying, perfect for use on most straws and drinking bottles with built in straws

Each stainless-steel straw cleaner measures approximately 19cm in length and features a 6mm cleaning brush. When used regularly, helps to extend the life of your reusable straw. They are also good for cleaning water bottles to wash those hard to reach places enabling you to give a detailed clean.
